entity.summary: Argentina-founded Latin American cryptocurrency platform established in 2013 as BitPagos, renamed Ripio in January 2017, and expanded through the January 2021 acquisition of Brazilian exchange BitcoinTrade.
entity.notes: Ripio's official institutional site describes the group as operating in Latin America since 2013. Independent contemporary reporting documents the BitPagos-to-Ripio rebrand on January 3, 2017, and Ripio's own announcement records the BitcoinTrade acquisition on January 5, 2021.

expected.summary: Argentina-based centralized exchange launched in 2013 and still operating under the Ripio brand.

changes.summary: Argentina-founded Latin American cryptocurrency platform established in 2013 as BitPagos, renamed Ripio in January 2017, and expanded through the January 2021 acquisition of Brazilian exchange BitcoinTrade.
changes.notes: Ripio's official institutional site describes the group as operating in Latin America since 2013. Independent contemporary reporting documents the BitPagos-to-Ripio rebrand on January 3, 2017, and Ripio's own announcement records the BitcoinTrade acquisition on January 5, 2021.

events.title: BitPagos began the corporate lineage later known as Ripio
events.description: The platform lineage that became Ripio began in Argentina in 2013 under the BitPagos name.
events.notes: The reviewed official sources establish the year but not an exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: BitPagos rebranded its consumer platform as Ripio
events.description: BitPagos announced that its consumer-facing bitcoin wallet and brokerage business would operate under the Ripio brand.
events.notes: Contemporary independent reports dated January 3, 2017 document the rebrand.

events.title: Ripio acquired Brazilian exchange BitcoinTrade
events.description: Ripio acquired BitcoinTrade as part of its expansion in Brazil and the wider Latin American market.
events.notes: The acquisition was announced by Ripio and independently reported on January 5, 2021.

evidence.title: Ripio institutional site
evidence.notes: Ripio's institutional site states that the group has led crypto adoption in Latin America since 2013.

evidence.title: Ripio official platform
evidence.notes: The official platform states that Ripio has operated in Latin America since 2013 and verifies the current active brand.

evidence.title: BitPagos Raises $1.9 Million in Funding, Rebrands as Ripio
evidence.notes: Contemporary report documents the BitPagos-to-Ripio rebrand.

evidence.title: BitPagos rebrands as Ripio and raises $1.9 million
evidence.notes: Independent contemporary coverage corroborates the Ripio rebrand and BitPagos lineage.

evidence.title: Ripio acquires Brazilian exchange BitcoinTrade to continue expansion in Latin America
evidence.notes: Ripio's announcement records its acquisition of BitcoinTrade.

evidence.title: Argentina's Ripio Acquires Second-Largest Crypto Exchange in Brazil
evidence.notes: Independent report corroborates the BitcoinTrade acquisition.
